title: Mumbai University Result 2026 Out

detail.title: Mumbai University Result 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Mumbai University has declared the MA Linguistics Semester 3 Supplementary and MMS Marketing Management Semester 2 Results 2026 for the 2025-2026 academic session. Students can check their result status online through the official Mumbai University result portal at mumresults.in.

content.text: Mumbai University has officially released the Mumbai University Result 2026 for selected PG and professional courses for the current academic session. The latest results have been declared for Master of Arts (Linguistics) Semester 3 (NEP 2020) Supplementary and Three Year Part Time MMS Marketing Management Third Year Semester 2 (Choice Based). Mumbai University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - mu.ac.in.

Students can check and download their Mumbai University result from the dedicated result portal mumresults.in by opening the relevant result link and viewing the published PDF. In most cases, candidates can search their seat number or name in the PDF or use the search function to view their marks and result status. After downloading the result, students are advised to carefully verify their name, seat number, course, semester and marks, and contact the university or their respective department immediately in case of any discrepancy.

Mumbai University has published new results for the 2026 session for MA and MMS programmes on its official result portal. The latest update includes the MA Linguistics Semester 3 (NEP 2020) Supplementary result and the Three Year Part Time MMS Marketing Management Third Year Semester 2 result. Students can access and download their Mumbai University Results 2026 directly from mumresults.in using the course-wise result links without any login.

Mumbai University has activated the direct links to check Mumbai University Result 2026 for the recently announced MA and MMS semester examinations. Students of MA (Linguistics) and MMS Marketing Management can open the official result PDFs through the result portal and instantly view or download their marks and result status. Use the course-wise Mumbai University Result 2026 direct link table below to access your result quickly through the official portal.

links.label: Master of Arts (Linguistics) Semester - III (NEP 2020) Supplementary Result 2026
Three Year Part Time MMS Marketing Management (Third Year) Semester - II (Choice Based) Result 2026
Mumbai University All Latest Results 2026 Portal

sections.heading: How to Check Mumbai University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download the Mumbai University Result 2026 from the official result portal:

items: Visit the official Mumbai University result website: Click Here

On the homepage, look for the latest result notifications for 2026, or directly search for your course and semester name such as "MA (Linguistics) Semester III NEP 2020 Supplementary" or "Three Year Part Time MMS Marketing Management Third Year Semester II".
Click on the relevant result link to open the result PDF in a new tab.
Once the PDF opens, use the search function (Ctrl + F on keyboard) to find your seat number / roll number or name in the result list.
Check your marks, result status (pass, fail, ATKT etc.) and any remarks mentioned against your details.
Download the PDF and save it to your device, and if needed, take a printout for future reference and record keeping.
